One-Command Deploy: Vue CLI to GitHub Pages
When you finish a Vue CLI project, you usually want to deploy it somewhere so people can see it — GitHub Pages being one option. This post walks through how to deploy it in a single command.

How to Send a Pull Request on GitHub
Pull request is a fairly unique GitHub mechanism (though GitLab has its own version too). This post focuses on how to actually send a PR on GitHub.
